name: overlooked_angel
description: TikTok template for overlooked dogs - seniors, black dogs, pit bulls, special needs

variables.is_senior: Boolean - Is the dog a senior (7+ years)
variables.is_black_dog: Boolean - Is the dog predominantly black
variables.is_pit_bull: Boolean - Is the dog a pit bull type
variables.has_special_needs: Boolean - Does the dog have special needs
